html: Microsoft Power BI. Embed reports via the official powerbi-client SDK. Requires an embed URL, workspace ID, and report ID. Authentication can be SSO (AAD), service principal, or a paste-in secure embed link.
text: Microsoft Power BI. Embed reports via the official powerbi-client SDK. Requires an embed URL, workspace ID, and report ID. Authentication can be SSO (AAD), service principal, or a paste-in secure embed link.

html: PulsePlay orchestrates AI — it doesn't run the model. Pick a profile your proxy already knows about (Genie, Foundation Model, Supervisor, Azure OpenAI, etc.).
text: PulsePlay orchestrates AI — it doesn't run the model. Pick a profile your proxy already knows about (Genie, Foundation Model, Supervisor, Azure OpenAI, etc.).

html: A pack is a bundle of domain terms, metric definitions, and guidance prompts. Without a pack the assistant uses generic vocabulary; with one it speaks your industry's language (CPG, retail, finance, etc.).
text: A pack is a bundle of domain terms, metric definitions, and guidance prompts. Without a pack the assistant uses generic vocabulary; with one it speaks your industry's language (CPG, retail, finance, etc.).
